rule: Verified chunk receipts record section-8 progress without treating partial progress as whole-file completion.

receipts.selected_candidate: Add an explicit section-20 execution-order matrix to the optimization audit.
rejected_candidates: Claim completion from final green checks alone
Keep execution order as prose only
preserved_invariants: Body-before-MIND
no runtime behavior change
strict audit remains non-mutating
PASS remains unavailable while protocol rows are REVISE
receipts.complexity_delta: adds explicit matrix rows; avoids implicit completion logic
risks: ledger is audit evidence, not proof of whole-project completion

receipts.selected_candidate: Add OPT-15 to prove the execution-order matrix is complete and ordered.
rejected_candidates: Rely on manual inspection of optimize-audit output
preserved_invariants: security invariant suite remains stdlib-only
no invariant is weakened
execution order cannot skip middle protocol steps
receipts.performance_delta: invariant suite adds one audit assertion
risks: project remains REVISE until later protocol rows pass

receipts.chunk_kind: python audit-ledger function and report-output cluster
receipts.selected_candidate: Add section-7 characterization-test receipts for merge and rewrite candidates.
rejected_candidates: Merge candidates before focused characterization tests
Leave characterization tests as a hard-coded execution-order blocker
preserved_invariants: no code merge without parity proof
mutation_allowed remains false for underspecified behavior
strict audit remains non-mutating
receipts.complexity_delta: adds focused proof rows before later rewrites
risks: queued tests are prerequisites, not completion proof

receipts.selected_candidate: Add OPT-16 to prove characterization rows block mutation until focused tests exist.
rejected_candidates: Trust audit JSON shape without an invariant
preserved_invariants: security invariant suite remains stdlib-only
merge/deletion remains blocked without characterization
receipts.performance_delta: invariant suite adds one audit assertion
risks: candidate-specific tests still need later implementation

receipts.chunk_kind: python audit-ledger function and file-completion gate cluster
receipts.selected_candidate: Load committed chunk receipts and count verified entries as partial file-review progress.
rejected_candidates: Infer durable chunk completion from clean git status
Mark whole files complete from one changed chunk
preserved_invariants: partial progress remains REVISE
strict audit rejects malformed proof receipts
no organism runtime behavior change
secret-like content is rejected from ledger evidence
receipts.complexity_delta: adds a small durable receipt reader and file-gate link
receipts.performance_delta: audit reads one small JSON file; runtime path unaffected
risks: ledger receipt quality depends on future strict invariants

receipts.selected_candidate: Add OPT-17 to prove durable chunk receipts are well-formed and counted as partial progress.
rejected_candidates: Allow the ledger without an invariant
Treat ledger rows as whole-file completion
preserved_invariants: security invariant suite remains stdlib-only
partial chunk progress remains distinguishable from PASS
receipts.performance_delta: invariant suite reads the optimization audit report
risks: whole-project completion still requires many pending chunk receipts

receipts.selected_candidate: Commit a durable section-8 receipt ledger for verified chunk optimization passes.
rejected_candidates: Keep chunk receipts only in narrative refinement prose
Generate uncommitted artifacts as the only proof source
preserved_invariants: no secrets, keys, prompts, completions, or private file contents are stored
ledger is evidence only and cannot authorize mutation
partial progress remains REVISE
receipts.performance_delta: audit reads one small JSON file; runtime path unaffected
risks: ledger must remain summary-only and secret-free

documentation characterization does not authorize merge or deletion

receipts.performance_delta: audit reads one small JSON file; runtime path unaffected

receipts.selected_candidate: Strengthen OPT-16 to prove documentation candidates are characterized and still non-mutating.
rejected_candidates: Accept characterization cases without invariant coverage

preserved_invariants: security invariant suite remains stdlib-only
no merge or deletion is allowed by characterization alone

receipts.performance_delta: invariant suite reads the optimization audit report

receipts.selected_candidate: Commit focused characterization cases for all queued documentation-topic merge candidates.
rejected_candidates: Keep characterization evidence only in generated artifacts
Treat same-name documentation pairs as removable duplicates

receipts.performance_delta: audit reads one small JSON file; runtime path unaffected

receipts.selected_candidate: Treat tracked-file coverage as the inventory completion condition and expose extra untracked files as evidence.

no runtime behavior change
tracked source files must still be present

receipts.selected_candidate: Strengthen OPT-14 around tracked coverage and explicit extra-untracked accounting.

completion remains REVISE until unresolved protocol rows are closed

no new invariant count anchor is needed

receipts.selected_candidate: Use cached npm ci and bounded Demo Smoke steps instead of unbounded fresh npm install resolution.
rejected_candidates: Leave the stuck workflow pending
Remove Demo Smoke from main certification
preserved_invariants: browser demo smoke coverage remains present
live agent jsdom smoke coverage remains present
Python Zombie Body certification is unchanged
CI failures become observable instead of indefinite
evidence: npm lockfile generated by package manager
receipts.complexity_delta: adds explicit timeouts and lockfile-backed install
receipts.performance_delta: expected lower CI dependency-resolution variance through npm cache and npm ci
risks: external npm and Playwright browser downloads can still fail, but now fail within bounded time

receipts.selected_candidate: Commit the demo-smoke dependency lockfile generated by npm.
rejected_candidates: Continue resolving demo dependencies from package ranges on every CI run
Manually edit dependency versions
preserved_invariants: no production runtime dependency change
browser/jsdom demo tests keep their declared dependency surface
lockfile was generated by npm, not manually rewritten
receipts.complexity_delta: adds one deterministic dependency artifact for examples/tests
risks: lockfile must be regenerated through npm when package.json changes

receipts.selected_candidate: Scope the package-lock ignore rule to the repository root so examples/tests can commit its lockfile.
rejected_candidates: Force-add an ignored lockfile without explaining the exception
Stop ignoring root package-lock artifacts globally
preserved_invariants: root package-lock remains ignored
node_modules and Playwright outputs remain ignored
demo-smoke lockfile becomes an intentional tracked artifact
evidence: git check-ignore no longer ignores examples/tests/package-lock.json
risks: additional nested package-lock files would become trackable only when intentionally added
